# MIGRATION PLANNED

This skill is scheduled to migrate from `flowmcp-spec` to `mcp-agent-server` in a follow-up memo.

## Why

The skill is a cross-cutting tutorial (uses spec + cli + schemas + agent-server), but its deployment step imports `AgentToolsServer` from `mcp-agent-server` — the end-artifact is deployed there, not here.

Three reasons (from Memo 049 REV-04 Chapter 9.2 skill-read analysis):

1. **Code-Import:** Step 7 contains `import { AgentToolsServer } from 'mcp-agent-server'`. The skill cannot execute without the consumer repo.
2. **Output:** The skill produces a code artifact (`agents/{name}/agent.mjs` + `skills/*.mjs`), not spec content.
3. **End goal:** Deployment as an MCP server on port 4100 — not abstract spec understanding.

The spec-repo reference in Phase 5 of the skill (Schema format) is a **prerequisite** (read the spec format), not a **production target**.

## Replacement at this location

After migration, this folder is removed. A pointer entry stays in [`../README.md`](../README.md) — that file lists the new location (`mcp-agent-server/skills/create-agent/`) so anyone browsing `flowmcp-spec/skills/` can still discover the skill.

## When

Memo 049 documents the **decision**. The **migration** is a follow-up memo (touch-points in `mcp-agent-server`, repo coordination, tests).
